problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: If Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area is applied to subjective, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
